title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
